form.formComment: At debut, finished ninth of 12 starters at Huntingdon on March 1 over 3200m, 71 len behind Hidden Mountain carrying 71kg at $23. Hard to see him featuring in the finish today.

form.formComment: Is third-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Last start ran last in a small field at Wetherby on March 27 over 3200m, 48 len behind Matador St Georges with 69.5kg at $251 and before that ran last at Huntingdon on March 1 over 3200m, 288 len behind Hidden Mountain with 71kg at $151. Should be better for the experience but not likely to threaten this field.

Should be better for the experience but not likely to threaten this field.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only had one start last when he was finished third in a small field at this track on November 26 over 3300m, 3.5 len behind Moore Brion with 71kg at $11. Looks a strong top-three chance.
